gary_2026_07_24_founder_strength_club.title: Founder Strength Club
gary_2026_07_24_founder_strength_club.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_24_founder_strength_club.summary: Gary's Guide: Hi, Andrew Yeung here. We started the Junto Founder Dinner series two years ago to bring together the top founders + builders. This time, we're doing something a little different. Instead of a seated breakfast, we're bringing together 24 vetted early-stage founders & CEOs for a private strength-based networking experience at a premier gym in New York. The session will be a 60-minute group workout class designed specifically to help ambitious founders connect in a more active, energizing environment. Expect a moderate-intensity strength class that is approachable for different fitness levels, but still requires the ability to participate in a full physical training session. After class, we'll have time to cool down, connect, & continue conversations with fellow high-performing startup leaders. What to expect: A private group strength class at a premier gym in New York Conversations with fellow ambitious founders, CEOs, & builders A post-class networking moment to meet peers solving similar problems Our only intent is to bring good, smart humans together - this time, with a little sweat involved. Details: Date: July 24, 2026 Time: 9:00am - 11:00am Venue: Premier Gym in New York Please note: This experience includes a physical group training class. You should be comfortable participating in approximately 60 minutes of moderate-intensity exercise. Apply to join by filling out the RSVP form. About our hosts & sponsors: Andrew Yeung is the Founder, CEO of fibe - a portfolio of events companies including andrew's mixers, The Junto Series & Lumos House. & the OOO Summit. He is also a Partner at Next Wave NYC, a pre-seed/seed found backed by Flybridge Capital. Andrew's hosted 100+ events for 50k+ tech founders & professionals in 8 cities that were featured in Bloomberg, Business Insider, Fast Company, & Fortune Magazine. Business Insider dubbed him the "Gatsby of Silicon Alley." Rho is the all-in-one banking platform for startups. With banking set up in minutes, 2% cashback cards, & powerful tools for managing spend, paying bills, & closing the books, Rho helps high-growth startups move fast & stay focused-with support that goes to the ends of the earth to help you win. Lowenstein Sandler's ECVC group delivers tailored legal strategies for launching, scaling, & financing companies in life sciences & healthcare. They close thousands of deals each year & advise founders on financings, licensing, & IP.

gary_2026_07_25_nj_code_coffee.title: NJ Code & Coffee
gary_2026_07_25_nj_code_coffee.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_25_nj_code_coffee.summary: Gary's Guide: Calling all New Jersey techies to the monthly NJ Code & Coffee tech community meetup at the EqualSpace ES550 Tech & Innovation campus! Code & Coffee is an inclusive, informal networking/co-working session for those in tech (and the tech-curious). That includes operators, founders, & investors. Developers, data engineers, UX/UI designers, data scientists, product managers, software engineers, solution architects... all are welcome! People of all skill & experience levels can attend, we love it that way. Many people (optionally) bring projects to work on, & many other people (optionally) socialize the entire time. It's entirely up to you! Come grab a cup of coffee & meet new people, share stories, find collaborators, talk about everything tech, talk about everything NOT tech, take a break from job applications, get away from the computer screen, make connections, make conversation, make friends! Agenda: 2pm: Doors open, networking starts 2:30pm: Intro circle 3pm: networking continues 5pm: event ends The Intro Circle Near the beginning of the event (about 2:30 pm), we will do a standup in a circle: We first talk about organizer announcements, updates, & logistics. Then we go around the circle where each person says: *your name & job title/ role in tech/ tech stack, What you can help others with, *What you would like help with, Job opportunities you're hiring for OR announce that you are looking for one. If none, that's cool. After the introduction circle, everything is self-organized. Community Discord - come hang out before & after!: www.codeandcoffee.chat The Venue Equal Space is a premium share-space created with multicultural business owners in mind, =SPACE equips founders with resources, programming & a powerful network. Headquartered in the City of Newark, their share-space provides resources for startups, coaching for tech companies, & a wealth of intellectuals to collaborate & build with. The next wave in enterprises is being born within their walls. Become a part of the story: [EqualSpace.co/](https://equalspace.co/)

gary_2026_07_26_code_coffee.title: Code & Coffee
gary_2026_07_26_code_coffee.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_26_code_coffee.summary: Gary's Guide: Code & Coffee is an inclusive, informal co-working session. People of all skill levels attend, & we love it that way. Many people (optionally) bring projects to work on, & many other people (optionally) socialize the entire time. It's entirely up to you! The Intro Circle Near the beginning of the event (2:30 pm), we do a standup in a circle: We first share organizer announcements, updates, & logistics Introductions (7 secs max): Your name Tech/coding topic(s) you want to talk about Non-tech topic(s) you want to talk about Job opportunities you're hiring for OR announce that you are looking for one. If none, that's cool. After the introduction circle, everything is self-organized. We sometimes have FEATURES in a nearby room; check out those events on Meetup as well. Doors close at 4:00pm. Please keep us updated in the comments if you're intending to show up late, as we want to ensure our venue hosts are able to clean up in time to get out by 5pm & enjoy their weekends. Community Discord - come hang out before & after!: www.codeandcoffee.chat Our Venue & Coffee Sponsor Datadog is the observability & security platform for cloud applications. Our SaaS platform integrates & automates infrastructure monitoring, application performance monitoring, log management, real-user monitoring, & many other capabilities to provide unified, real-time observability & security for our customers' entire technology stack.

gary_2026_07_26_informationbanker_fintec.title: Informationbanker Fintech & AI Networking Walk
gary_2026_07_26_informationbanker_fintec.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_26_informationbanker_fintec.summary: Gary's Guide: If you're interested in or working in Financial Services, Technology or AI (or all three), come join us for a walk over the Brooklyn Bridge. While we walk there is a great opportunity for casual conversation & networking. A great way to connect with people & get your workout in at the same time. Everyone who completes the walk will be invited to join a LinkedIn group so we can stay in touch & continue to network. We gather for the walk across from the New York Stock Exchange in front of the Herms store in the Financial District.

gary_2026_07_27_b2b_ai_founders_investor.title: B2B - AI Founders & Investors Meetup
gary_2026_07_27_b2b_ai_founders_investor.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_27_b2b_ai_founders_investor.summary: Gary's Guide: NYC B2B is the premier community for B2B Founders, Operators, & Investors in NYC. NYC B2B often hosts happy hour events for founders, builders, & investors based in NYC. This is an exclusive event for B2B AI founders & investors. Want to sponsor this event? Email: newyorkcityventures@gmail.com This meetup is hosted by NYC B2B. It's a great way to meet other founders, builders, & investors. Whether you're building a company, exploring a side project, or considering a new idea, we would love to have you here. NYC B2B has previously hosted events for thousands of B2B startup founders + operators in NYC across Vertical SaaS, AI, FinTech, Healthcare, DevTools, Infrastructure, & more. By signing up, you are confirming your interest in hearing about more events from NYC B2B in the future via email! NYC B2B also helps connect those who sign up with awesome partners. Note: This is a 21+ event. Please let our team know in advance if you'd like to bring a guest, as unregistered +1s will not be admitted. Attendees who disregard this policy may not be invited to future NYC B2B events. - Hiring or looking for jobs? startupjobs.nyc

gary_2026_07_27_healthtech_startup_mixer.title: HealthTech Startup Mixer
gary_2026_07_27_healthtech_startup_mixer.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_27_healthtech_startup_mixer.summary: Gary's Guide: Connect with HealthTech startups, investors, & industry experts for an evening of rapid-fire pitches, conversations & opportunities. HealthTech Innovators Networking Event Join us for a high-value evening bringing together HealthTech & MedTech founders, innovators, investors, clinicians, engineers, & industry professionals building the future of healthcare. This event is designed for people who want real connections, real conversations, & real opportunities - not panels, not presentations, just meaningful networking that moves your work forward. Expect a dynamic atmosphere filled with forward-thinkers working on digital health, AI in medicine, medical devices, remote care, data-driven solutions, biotech-enabled tools, & everything shaping tomorrow's healthcare landscape. Event Highlights 1-Minute Elevator Pitches - Startup founders introduce their product, problem, or opportunity in a quick, punchy pitch designed to spark conversations. Open Networking Sessions - Meet HealthTech entrepreneurs, operators, investors, clinical experts, engineers, & product teams across the ecosystem. Connection-Focused Activities - Light, simple networking prompts that make it easy to meet people fast & naturally. Collaboration Opportunities - Discuss partnerships, pilots, funding, hiring needs, & shared challenges. Who Should Attend HealthTech & MedTech Startup Founders Innovators & Entrepreneurs in healthcare & technology Clinicians, Medical Experts & Healthcare Operators Investors, VCs, Angels & Accelerators Engineers, Developers, Data Scientists & Product Managers Business Development, Commercial & Strategy Leads Regulatory, Compliance & Health Data Specialists Anyone building, funding, or supporting healthcare innovation Why Attend Meet the people who matter - investors, partners, users, advisors, talent, collaborators. Discover real opportunities - from fundraising & pilots to partnerships, clients, & strategic support. Grow your network - quickly build meaningful connections with industry leaders & rising innovators. Career possibilities - connect with high-growth startups & teams actively recruiting or exploring new talent. Knowledge exchange - share experiences, obstacles, & insights in an informal setting where people actually talk openly. Stay ahead of innovation - hear what others are building, testing, scaling, & learning in digital health & MedTech. This event is designed to help you spark new relationships, uncover new opportunities, & surround yourself with like-minded people shaping the next wave of healthcare innovation. Don't miss the chance to connect with the brightest minds in the industry & elevate your network in one powerful evening. Guest Guidelines: Guests must be 21+ years old Please arrive well-presented Purchase one drink at the bar (alcohol-free options included) You will be able to join the dedicated Whatsapp group for the event & start networking before the actual event. Register now to secure your spot!

gary_2026_07_28_founder_investor_coffee_.title: Founder & Investor Coffee Hour
gary_2026_07_28_founder_investor_coffee_.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_28_founder_investor_coffee_.summary: Gary's Guide: Grab your coffee & your pitch deck, because it's time for another round of Founder x Investor Coffee Hours at A Cafe! This is the spot where YC founders, cracked builders, & NYC's sharpest operators come to caffeinate & connect, all with that Silicon Valley energy transplanted straight into the East Village. Come solo, come with your cofounder, come ready to pitch or just ready to talk shop, either way you'll find your people here. This time we're taking things up a notch. After the cafe wraps up, head over with the JellyJelly & A Cafe crew to their high rise office for round two. Whether you're closing your seed round, scouting your next investment, or just want to swap stories with the co-founder of Venmo (yes, really), this is exactly the room you want to be in. See you there!

gary_2026_07_28_workos_applied_ai_showca.title: WorkOS Applied AI Showcase
gary_2026_07_28_workos_applied_ai_showca.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_28_workos_applied_ai_showca.summary: Gary's Guide: Join the WorkOS Applied AI team for a live look at how we build, deploy, & scale internal AI tooling. From autonomous coding agents that take GitHub issues all the way to merged PRs, to GTM systems that enrich & score accounts on demand across Slack, dashboards, & MCP. We'll demo what's actually in production & share what we learned shipping a high volume of internal tools fast.

gary_2026_07_28_junto_founder_dinner.title: Junto Founder Dinner
gary_2026_07_28_junto_founder_dinner.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_28_junto_founder_dinner.summary: Gary's Guide: Hi, Andrew Yeung here. We started the Junto Founder Dinner series two years ago to bring together the top founders + builders. Each month, we invite 24 vetted early-stage founders & CEOs for a 3-hour, multiple-course dinner experience. What to expect: A 3-course meal, courtesy of our partners Conversations with fellow high-performing startup leaders A dinner experience designed to facilitate new connections & conversations, with rotating 6-person table formats Meaningful connections with ambitious peers solving similar problems If you're wondering how our dinners usually go... read this Our only intent is to bring good, smart humans together. Details: Date: July 28, 2026 Time: 6:00pm - 8:30pm Venue: Private Dinner Club in NYC Past attendees of my events include the founders/C-suite of Venmo, Duolingo, Foursquare, Lyft, Goldman Sachs, Compass, Superhuman, Yext, OpenDoor, Chief, LearnVest, DocSend, Vercel, Loom, Morning Brew, The Hustle, Gas, Teachable, Replit, Twitter, Slack, Pinterest, Yahoo, MongoDB, Business Insider, Wonder, Hinge. Apply to join by filling out the RSVP form.

gary_2026_07_28_padel_w_founders.title: Padel w/ Founders
gary_2026_07_28_padel_w_founders.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_28_padel_w_founders.place: Mink Padel at Harlem, 439 W 127th St
gary_2026_07_28_padel_w_founders.summary: Gary's Guide: Oceans Talent & Mink Padel invite you to eat, drink, learn & PLAY PADEL . Join us for an evening with fellow founders & learn how to leverage global talent to scale operations & build brands. What to expect: Break a sweat: pick up a racket & join a padel game (beginners & advanced players welcome!) Eat: delicious bites from our favorite local Vietnamese spot Hydrate: beers, seltzers, & refreshers! Network: meet fellow founders across CPG, tech, law & creative media Learn: how your peers are solving problems & scaling operations Most importantly, come to have fun! This is a private event. RSVP via Partiful link is required. Please reach out to marietta@oceanstalent.com for more information.

gary_2026_07_28_jfe_startup_tech_rooftop.title: JFE Startup & Tech Rooftop Mixer
gary_2026_07_28_jfe_startup_tech_rooftop.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_28_jfe_startup_tech_rooftop.summary: Gary's Guide: JFE Network is excited to host its first Startup & Tech Rooftop Mixer in Hudson Yards, NY, with views overlooking the city! Join NY's premier startup & tech community for a fun summer gathering for networking & a great time connecting with our startup & tech network. JFE Networking mixers bring together NY's top startup founders, technologists, & business professionals in the Jewish community. If you're looking for co-founders to launch a startup or new career opportunities in tech, then you should join us! Many of our attendees formed deep relationships, hired each other, or started companies together. JFE (Jews For Entrepreneurship) Network For those who don't know about us, JFE (Jews For Entrepreneurship organization) is the leading & only organization that supports Jewish innovation & entrepreneurship worldwide. Since our launch in 2009, we have hosted over 120 events, including pitch events, seminars, speaker panels, startup accelerators, pitches for series A companies, career fairs, & networking mixers. We are now actively hosting events in SF, LA, Miami, NY, London, & New Mexico Read more about us here: www.jfenetwork.com

gary_2026_07_29_junto_founder_dinner.title: Junto Founder Dinner
gary_2026_07_29_junto_founder_dinner.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_29_junto_founder_dinner.summary: Gary's Guide: Hi, Andrew Yeung here. We started the Junto Founder Dinner series two years ago to bring together the top founders + builders. Each month, we invite 24 vetted early-stage founders & CEOs for a 3-hour, multiple-course dinner experience. What to expect: A 3-course meal, courtesy of our partners Conversations with fellow high-performing startup leaders A dinner experience designed to facilitate new connections & conversations, with rotating 6-person table formats Meaningful connections with ambitious peers solving similar problems If you're wondering how our dinners usually go... read this Our only intent is to bring good, smart humans together. Details: Date: July 29, 2026 Time: 6:00pm - 8:30pm Venue: Private Dinner Club in NYC Past attendees of my events include the founders/C-suite of Venmo, Duolingo, Foursquare, Lyft, Goldman Sachs, Compass, Superhuman, Yext, OpenDoor, Chief, LearnVest, DocSend, Vercel, Loom, Morning Brew, The Hustle, Gas, Teachable, Replit, Twitter, Slack, Pinterest, Yahoo, MongoDB, Business Insider, Wonder, Hinge. Apply to join by filling out the RSVP form. About our Hosts & Sponsors: Andrew Yeung is the founder of Fibe & The Shortlist NYC. He is also an angel investor & Partner at Next Wave NYC, a pre-seed venture fund. Andrew has hosted over 300 events for 50,000 founders, operators, investors, & tech professionals that were featured by Bloomberg, Business Insider, Fast Company, Fortune Magazine, Axios, Newsweek, & Forbes. Business Insider dubbed him the "Gatsby of Silicon Alley." Fidelity brings certainty to startup founders & leaders with our automated cap table & equity management platform. No matter where you are on your journey, Fidelity has the expertise & robust support to help guide you. Looking for an alternative to your current equity management solution? Our team will guide you through a smooth transition to our platform. Comp AI helps startups get SOC 2 or ISO 27001 audit-ready in just a few days, without slowing down the team. Evidence collection, controls, vendor management, & audit prep run on autopilot, so you stay audit-ready 24/7. Trusted by fast-growing teams like Dub, Better Auth, & Corgi. As a thank-you for joining us tonight, you get $2,000 off compliance. Manifest Law is a modern immigration law firm built for founders, startups, & fast-growing companies. Manifest specializes in securing visas & work authorization for immigrant entrepreneurs & top global talent, helping companies navigate complex U.S. immigration pathways with speed, clarity, & a startup-first mindset-so builders can focus on scaling, not paperwork Get on the list for future events: Twitter Instagram Website

gary_2026_07_29_ai_tinkerers_summer_soci.title: AI Tinkerers Summer Social - Rooftop Oyster Party
gary_2026_07_29_ai_tinkerers_summer_soci.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_29_ai_tinkerers_summer_soci.summary: Gary's Guide: AI Tinkerers NYC Summer Social: Rooftop Oyster Special Celebrating 2 Years of AI Tinkerers in NYC Two years in. Thousands of builders deep. Let's party. About two years ago, a handful of NYC builders started showing up to tinker, demo, & trade notes on what was actually working with AI. Today, AI Tinkerers is a worldwide network of 25+ cities & thousands of active builders shipping real applications & shaping the future of the field - & NYC has become one of its most active chapters. It's been an amazing experience & I want to celebrate! We're throwing a rooftop summer social to celebrate. Bring what you're working on, get ready to have some oysters, shuck open your laptop for an impromptu demo, & meet the bleeding edge of whose building AI. Come for the oysters, stay for the messy WIP demos, leave with new collaborators. Who this is for It's AI Tinkerers, not AI enthusiasts. We screen attendance to active builders with a shared level of expertise in order to create a collaborative environment ideal for early-stage discovery & innovation. This event is perfect for AI practitioners, developers, researchers, & entrepreneurs who are actively building & working with AI technologies. What to expect Fresh shucked oysters on a bed of ice, hand-shucked all evening Fellow technical builders this is a gathering of AI Tinkerers, it is highly encouraged to bring what you are working on to show fellow builders. Rooftop views of the city at golden hour The room you actually want to be in: seed/Series A founders, founding engineers, & the city's most active AI builders RSVP Space is limited. Apply above !

gary_2026_07_29_founders_operators_rooft.summary: Gary's Guide: Join us for a curated mixer bringing together local founders, operators & investors at one of New York's most iconic rooftops. Whether you're building your first product, scaling your team, or figuring out go-to-market, this is a room of people who get it. No panels. No pitches. Just great peer to peer conversation over drinks. With friends from: YC, a16z speedrun, a16z, xAI, ElevenLabs, Meta, TikTok, Stripe, NVentures, baseten, Brex, Clay, Legora, & more. Location: Premium Rooftop Bar, Lower East Side Vibe: Summer Spritz & Conversation Who this is for: Early-stage founders & growth-stage operators based in NYC Impressions from last time: Questions? E-Mail us at hello@foundersandoperators.nyc Hosted by: foundersandoperators.nyc & Stephan Rihs (Building @Veynor, Founder @Rihs Ventures, ex-Coinbase & BCG, Treasury/Chancellor's Office)

gary_2026_07_30_buzzfeed_ai_demos_happy_.title: BuzzFeed AI Demos & Happy Social Hour
gary_2026_07_30_buzzfeed_ai_demos_happy_.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_30_buzzfeed_ai_demos_happy_.summary: Gary's Guide: If your idea of a fun Thursday involves seeing cool AI projects & wondering, "Wait... how did they make that?" Come hang out with us. BuzzFeed is teaming up with NYC AI Coworking for an afternoon of live demos from builders across the community. You'll see BuzzFeed's latest projects, Conjure & Rat Race, along with a lineup of demos from members of Chris's network who have been busy making all kinds of weird, clever, & genuinely impressive things. Then we'll trade demos for drinks. Stick around for a laid-back happy social hour with seltzers, AI challenges, good conversations, & plenty of time to meet the people behind the projects. Ask questions, swap ideas, give feedback, or just nerd out about AI with people who won't glaze over after thirty seconds. Whether you build AI for a living, tinker with it on weekends, or just like seeing what people are making, we'd love to have you. Thursday, July 30 3:00-5:00 PM Flatiron Come for the demos. Stay because you accidentally started a 20-minute conversation about prompting & poltergeists.

gary_2026_08_05_startup_founders_investo.title: Startup Founders, Investors & Talent Mixer
gary_2026_08_05_startup_founders_investo.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_08_05_startup_founders_investo.summary: Gary's Guide: New York Startup Networking Event. Meet Founders, Investors, & Talent - Build or Scale Your Startup Startup Networking Event in New York for founders, investors, & tech talent. Join a high-signal startup networking event in New York where founders, investors, & talent connect to build & scale startups.Meet the right people, unlock real opportunities, & grow within the New York startup ecosystem. Why This Event Is Different Most networking events end with exchanged LinkedIn profiles. This one focuses on real conversations & real opportunities. We bring together founders, investors, engineers, operators & talent in a curated environment designed to create meaningful connections. Through interactive networking rounds, open conversations & pitch opportunities, participants can share challenges, exchange insights & build relationships that last beyond the event. What to Expect Startup Networking in New York Structured networking rounds where founders, investors, & talent connect, share challenges, & explore opportunities. Talent & Hiring Connections Meet engineers, operators, & professionals in the New York startup ecosystem. Startup & Investor Conversations Discussions around fundraising, product development, & scaling startups. Want to Pitch? A limited number of founders will have the opportunity to present their startup. Selected founders will showcase their pitch deck to the audience & attending investors, followed by a short Q&A where participants can ask questions & share feedback. Apply by sending your pitch Spots are limited & founders will be selected in advance. Who Should Attend Startup founders in New York VC & angels investors Engineers & builders Operators & product managers Recruiters & HR professionals Sales & business development professionals Job seekers interested in startups Newcomers to the New York tech ecosystem For Investors We invite local investors, angels & venture capitalists to join the event. Investor participation is complimentary. After verification, investors receive access to the Ascent Valley ecosystem, including: curated startup introductions access to our startup digest access to our platform & founder community

gary_2026_08_05_3x_ae_selling_at_ai_spee.title: 3x AE - Selling At AI Speed
gary_2026_08_05_3x_ae_selling_at_ai_spee.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_08_05_3x_ae_selling_at_ai_spee.summary: Gary's Guide: We're pulling together a room of top sales pros from hypergrowth companies across the city for drinks, food, & real conversation about what separates the best from everyone else. No pitch decks, no vendor booths, just good people & better war stories. The night stays casual, but we're setting up dedicated breakout lounges for Healthcare Sales, Housing Sales, & Enablement, so you can find your people & go deep on the conversations that matter most to you. Wander between them or park in one all night. Built something clever with AI - a tool, a skill, a workflow? Bring your laptop & show it off. Midway through the night, we'll all sit down for a short talk: "Inside the Playbook of Top AEs at Hypergrowth Companies." Expect tactical, specific insight: how the top 1% structure their day, qualify faster, & use AI to close more without working more. Then back to drinks & conversation. Come to meet the sharpest sales pros in New York. Hosted by EliseAI at our office on Fifth Avenue --- This event may be photographed, filmed, or otherwise recorded. By attending, you consent to be recorded & agree that EliseAI may use any photos, videos, & other recordings from the event (in which your image or voice may appear) for marketing purposes, including on our website & social media, without further authorization from or compensation to you. If you are not comfortable being recorded, please speak to an event organizer.

gary_2026_08_06_startup_mixer.title: Startup Mixer
gary_2026_08_06_startup_mixer.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_08_06_startup_mixer.summary: Gary's Guide: NYC Tech &Startup Mixer - brought to you by Startup+ We're putting founders, engineers, investors, recruiters, freelancers, & mentors in the same room for a night of straightup networking. No panels, no speeches-just real conversations. If you're testing an idea, raising cash, or hiring your first dev, this is the place to be. Newsletter (exclusive entry & event drops): https://newsletter.startupplus.club Sponsorship / press: email - contact@startupplus.club Volunteer (Complimentary Ticket): email - contact@startupplus.club Why swing by? Meet 100+ builders & backers in one go Swap stories, get quick feedback, share lessons learned Spot future cofounders, investors, customers-maybe all three What's the setup? We've got a dedicated space, & name tags at the door Flash a business card or a LinkedIn QR-whatever works Dress code? Businesscasual. Jeans totally fine. A quick word on Startup+ We kicked this off in 2021, in the middle of the pandemic, because Zoom mixers just weren't cutting it. Fastforward: 25k members, 75+ mixers, 12 pitch nights, & 6000 folks through the doors. We keep it simple-connect good people & let the magic happen. Headsup: capacity is capped. Only confirmed Luma RSVPs are admitted at the door. Walkins = no go. Fine print : By joining, you agree that photos/video taken may be used in future Startup+ promos. Also, you agree that the contact info collected will be used to send future event invites & promotions via newsletter/other event platforms. See you IRL!!!

jc_culture_10003561_2026_07_29_hamilton_.title: Hamilton Park Farmers Market 2026
jc_culture_10003561_2026_07_29_hamilton_.label: Festival / Market
jc_culture_10003561_2026_07_29_hamilton_.place: Hamilton Park, 9 McWilliams Pl., Jersey City, NJ
jc_culture_10003561_2026_07_29_hamilton_.summary: Join us at the Hamilton Park Farmers Market, your midweek destination for fresh, local, and thoughtfully crafted food and goods. Each week, we’re proud to feature farm-fresh produce from Stony Hill Farm alongside a curated selection of specialty vendors. Browse a variety of offerings including our long time vendor Pickles and Olives, fresh seafood from Scale Fish Market, and prepared foods perfect for dinner. You can also find baked goods, candles, personal care products, and more. You can even take advantage of convenient services like on-site knife sharpening while you shop. On the first and second Wednesdays of each month, enjoy live entertainment that adds to the vibrant, community atmosphere of the market. Whether you’re shopping for the week, grabbing a bite, or simply enjoying the park, the Hamilton Park Farmers Market is a welcoming space to connect with local vendors and neighbors.

jc_culture_10003562_2026_08_05_hamilton_.title: Hamilton Park Farmers Market 2026
jc_culture_10003562_2026_08_05_hamilton_.label: Festival / Market
jc_culture_10003562_2026_08_05_hamilton_.place: Hamilton Park, 9 McWilliams Pl., Jersey City, NJ
jc_culture_10003562_2026_08_05_hamilton_.summary: Join us at the Hamilton Park Farmers Market, your midweek destination for fresh, local, and thoughtfully crafted food and goods. Each week, we’re proud to feature farm-fresh produce from Stony Hill Farm alongside a curated selection of specialty vendors. Browse a variety of offerings including our long time vendor Pickles and Olives, fresh seafood from Scale Fish Market, and prepared foods perfect for dinner. You can also find baked goods, candles, personal care products, and more. You can even take advantage of convenient services like on-site knife sharpening while you shop. On the first and second Wednesdays of each month, enjoy live entertainment that adds to the vibrant, community atmosphere of the market. Whether you’re shopping for the week, grabbing a bite, or simply enjoying the park, the Hamilton Park Farmers Market is a welcoming space to connect with local vendors and neighbors.

jc_culture_39177_2026_08_15_west_indian_.title: West Indian Family Picnic 2026
jc_culture_39177_2026_08_15_west_indian_.label: Festival / Market
jc_culture_39177_2026_08_15_west_indian_.place: Lincoln Park, 1 County Rd 605, Jersey City, NJ
jc_culture_39177_2026_08_15_west_indian_.summary: County Commissioner Bill O’Dea and Chico Ramchal along side the West Indian American Committee will be holding a West Indian Family Fun Day at Lincoln Park, on August 15th, 2026 beginning at 11am and concluding at 8:00pm. This event is intended to provide a day and location where families of a West Indian background of Hudson County can congregate and celebrate their culture. It will also provide an insight to experience the West Indian culture if you are from any descent. Among culture sharing the committee will provide a host of community games for all age groups. Some of these activities include a tug-o-war, 100m race, sack race, etc. In conjunction with the activities, we will have a show mobile on location that will provide music and non-band performances, such as cultural dancing. The expected turnout is estimated at, with the committee providing over 50 volunteers to help support the event.
